sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to rage, to roar-(a) as the sea, Psa 96:11 98:7 1Ch 16:32.-(b) as thunder (Syr. ܪܥܶܡ to thunder), compare Hiph. and רַעַם.-(c) as any one with rage, to be angry, see Hiph. (Syr. Ethp. id. Arab. رغم III. V. to be angry.)

(2) to tremble, Eze 27:35.

Hiphil-

(1) to thunder (of Jehovah), Psa 29:3 Job 40:9 1Sa 2:10.

(2) to provoke to anger, 1Sa 1:6. Hence-
